goal: Fix PathEvidence sampling timeout on compact proof DB.

root_cause.summary: The previous sampler ordered path_evidence with a computed expression and then performed per-edge/per-entity graph lookups for every sampled path.
specific_causes: Candidate selection used ORDER BY ((length(id) + seed) % N), which could not use the path_evidence primary key or rowid order.
Stored PathEvidence expansion used N+1 edge lookups through edges_compat and object_id_lookup.
Endpoint lookup joined object_id_lookup and qualified_name_lookup before the sample candidate set was fully bounded.
Proof mode could generate fallback paths from edges when stored PathEvidence was missing.

behavior: Proof mode disables generated fallback paths.
The sampler selects bounded path IDs first with a seeded rowid range and one wraparound pass.
Path rows are batch-loaded by sampled path IDs.
path_evidence_edges rows are batch-loaded by sampled path IDs and capped by --max-edge-load.
Edge exactness, confidence, provenance, context, and source-span labels are read from stored PathEvidence metadata/materialized rows instead of re-querying the full edge graph.
Source snippets are loaded only for sampled source spans when --include-snippets is set.
Sampler reports include EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN, timing spans, index checks, fallback status, and truncation status.

storage_semantics.removed_data_moved_or_derivable: No proof data was removed. This was a sampler/query-path change plus reporting; compact proof storage semantics were unchanged.

index_checks.path_evidence_path_id: satisfied by path_evidence.id primary key / rowid candidate selection
index_checks.path_evidence_edges_path_ordinal: satisfied by idx_path_evidence_edges_path_ordinal and WITHOUT ROWID primary key
index_checks.path_evidence_files_file_path: satisfied by idx_path_evidence_files_file and primary key
index_checks.path_evidence_tests_path_test: satisfied by path_evidence_tests primary key prefix path_id,test_id

remaining_notes: The endpoint batch lookup no longer expands object_id_lookup and qualified_name_lookup for normal repo://e/<hash> IDs. It resolves names by bounded entity_hash lookup and leaves qualified_name null in compact proof samples when reconstructing qnames would require expensive debug-style joins.
The sampler emits source spans, exactness labels, provenance edges, production/test/mock context labels, and snippets where source files are available.
No fallback paths are used in proof mode.
